name: Player Departure
description: Respectful farewell post for a departing player. Celebrates their contributions to the club with career highlights at Demo Brand.

farewell_message.example: Thank you for everything. Your dedication and goals will never be forgotten.

guidelines: Slide 1: Player cutout with 'Thank You' headline. Slide 2: Best moments photo collage. Slide 3: Career stats at Demo Brand in a clean infographic. Slide 4: Farewell quote from the player. Use a slightly muted blue accent to convey a bittersweet tone. Language should be grateful and warm.
